About Summit Welding

12+ years serving Detroit and surrounding areas

Summit Welding was founded in 2012 by a team of Detroit natives who saw the need for durable, weather-resistant metalwork in our region. What started as a two-man operation in Corktown has grown into a full-service welding company serving all of Southeast Michigan.

We approach every project with Midwest work ethic and engineering precision. Our welders are certified professionals who understand how Michigan's freeze-thaw cycles and road salt demand superior craftsmanship.

From repairing historic ironwork in Indian Village to fabricating custom garage doors for Rochester Hills homeowners, we're proud to strengthen Detroit's infrastructure one weld at a time.

12+ Years in Business
800+ Projects Completed
97% Client Satisfaction
20+ Team Members
Summit Welding

Trusted welding professionals serving Detroit, MI and the surrounding areas. Quality work, honest pricing, guaranteed satisfaction.
